data.title: Stocks of Seagate Technology and Western Digital surged on Monday, with triple-digit gains, ahead of earnings report.
data.description: Stocks of Seagate Technology and Western Digital saw a continued increase on Monday, contributing to a significant triple-digit surge. This trend is particularly noteworthy as the companies are set to reveal their earnings soon.

data.title: Boeing poised for earnings after delays. Stock in buy zone above buy point, ahead of earnings test.
data.description: Boeing is increasing its deliveries in response to previous delays and production limitations, aiming for a significant boost by 2025. The stock of the Dow Jones aircraft manufacturer is currently trading above a key buy threshold. The surge in Boeing's stock has placed it in a favorable buying range before the upcoming earnings evaluation.

data.title: Lands' End partners with WHP Global for cash infusion and brand expansion, drives investors' wait.
data.description: A recent collaboration between Lands' End and consumer brands firm WHP Global has been revealed by the company, providing Lands' End with a significant cash injection. This partnership has the potential to fuel the brand's growth and expansion. Investors are advised to keep a close watch on this development as it could have a positive impact on Lands' End's performance.

data.title: Legence, data center heating/cooling provider, up 80% post-September IPO, enters buy zone - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Legence, a leading supplier of heating and cooling solutions for data centers, has entered a new buying range after its initial public offering in September. The data center construction company Legence has surged by 80% since its IPO in September, indicating a strong market performance.

data.title: Janet Miller recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member in Inner Circle of Excellence for Residential Luxury Real Estate.
data.description: Janet Miller, a noteworthy figure in the field of residential luxury real estate, has been honored as a distinguished member of the Inner Circle of Excellence. Her accomplishments have earned her the prestigious title of Pinnacle Professional Member, as highlighted in The Inner Circle. This recognition showcases Miller's significant contributions to the industry.

data.title: Samuel Cape honored as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for currency security innovations.
data.description: In Woodstock, Georgia on January 26, 2026, Samuel Cape was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member for his achievements in advancing global currency security with Optical Design. Cape's work has been distinguished for its innovative contributions in this field.

data.title: Frances Iger Laterman recognized by The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member for her contributions in art.
data.description: One of the leading figures in Pioneering Classical Contemporary Art, Frances Iger Laterman, has been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle. This acknowledgment highlights her significant contributions to the field. The news was announced on January 26, 2026, in York, New York. The recognition further solidifies Laterman's status as a prominent figure within the art community.

data.title: Harmony Vallejo named Pinnacle Professional Member of The Inner Circle of Excellence in San Francisco, January 26, 2026.
data.description: In the San Francisco Bay Area, California on January 26, 2026, Harmony Vallejo has been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for her exceptional leadership and social influence. She has been featured prominently for her contributions to visionary leadership and social impact.

data.title: Steven Chananie recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for Healthcare Regulatory Law by The Inner Circle. Sheppard Mullin's Special Counsel.
data.description: In Mount Vernon, New York on January 26, 2026, Steven Chananie has been recognized as a distinguished member of The Inner Circle for his outstanding work in Healthcare Regulatory Law. Chananie, serving as Special Counsel at Sheppard Mullin, has been honored as a Pinnacle Professional Member within the Inner Circle of Excellence for his significant contributions. This acknowledgment highlights his expertise and achievements in the field.

data.title: Power outages at risk of increasing as freezing temps linger post winter storm. Grids held up well but experts warn of more disruptions.
data.description: Energy experts have noted that the electrical grids coped well with the recent storm over the weekend. However, they warn that there is still a lingering risk of further outages. The resilience shown by the grids during the storm is encouraging, with a low number of reported outages. Despite this positive outcome, experts emphasize the importance of preparedness for potential future disruptions in energy supply.
North Dakota oil output down 80k-110k b/d due to the cold.

data.title: MDA Space and Hanwha sign MOU for Korean military constellation program, aiming to advance next-gen satellite solutions.
data.description: Brampton-based MDA Space has joined forces with Gumi-si, Gyeongsangbuk-do in South Korea to enhance advanced satellite solutions for the national defense system. The partnership, announced on Jan. 26, 2026, marks a significant move in bolstering Korea's defense infrastructure. MDA Space, a leader in the space industry trading on the TSX under the symbol MDA, will work closely with partners in South Korea to drive innovations in satellite technology. This collaboration aligns with Korea's commitment to strengthening its defense capabilities and underscores the global significance of the initiative.

data.title: NRG Energy cleared to acquire 18 gas facilities and VPP platform from LS Power after DOJ antitrust approval on Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: In Houston today, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) revealed its reception of antitrust approval from the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for the acquisition of 18 natural gas generation facilities and a commercial and industrial virtual power plant platform (C&I VPP) from LS Power. This approval was obtained on January 23, 2026. Prior to this, NRG had already secured green lights from the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) and the New York State PUC.
US aircraft carrier and warships reach the Middle East - WAPO.
White House: More than 20 new additional countries have now signed up for the Board of Peace

data.title: Rimini Street (Nasdaq: RMNI) to announce Q4 & FY 2025 results on Feb 19, 2026 at 5pm Eastern, hosting a webcast.
data.description: Rimini Street, Inc. (Nasdaq: RMNI), a prominent third-party support provider for Oracle, SAP, and VMware software, will be releasing its earnings report on February 19, 2026, after the market closes. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern / 2:00 p.m. Pacific time to discuss the company's performance in the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025, as well as its outlook for 2026. The event will provide a live webcast for interested parties to tune in.
White House press Secretary Leavitt ends the briefing.

data.title: Antares' Mark-0 reactor receives DOE safety approval for demonstration, set to achieve criticality by July 4, 2026.
data.description: Antares, a nuclear fission energy company based in Idaho Falls, has received approval from the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) for its Preliminary Documented Safety Analysis (PDSA) concerning the Mark-0 reactor. The Mark-0 reactor is Antares' inaugural demonstration reactor, set to attain criticality by July 4, 2026, as part of the DOE’s Reactor Pilot Program. This approval marks a significant step forward for Antares in developing microreactors for defense and space applications. The DOE's certification of the PDSA paves the way for the reactor's progress.

data.title: Investors alerted as Hagens Berman investigates CPNG data breach of 33.7 million accounts and disclosure delays.
data.description: Attorney Reed Kathrein is looking into claims of "Proactive Security" in response to a former employee having 6 months of undetected access. In San Francisco, on January 26th, 2026, national law firm Hagens Berman is alerting investors of Coupang, Inc. (NYSE: CPNG) about an upcoming milestone in February.

data.title: Dimora Medical named Amazon Best Seller in Wound Dressings for 4th year. Leader in high-end medical care supplies.
data.description: In New York, Dimora Medical, known for its cutting-edge medical care supplies, has been recognized as a 2025 Amazon Best Seller in the Wound Dressings category. This achievement marks the fourth consecutive year that Dimora Medical has received this accolade, showcasing the brand's consistent popularity among consumers. This recognition highlights Dimora Medical's ongoing success in the market, solidifying its position as a top performer in the industry.
